Class AnnotatedElementBase<E extends AnnotatedElement>

java.lang.Object
iu.type.ElementBase
iu.type.AnnotatedElementBase<E>
Type Parameters:
E - annotated element type
All Implemented Interfaces:
edu.iu.type.IuAnnotatedElement
Direct Known Subclasses:
DeclaredElementBase, ParameterFacade
sealed class AnnotatedElementBase<E extends AnnotatedElement> extends ElementBase implements edu.iu.type.IuAnnotatedElement permits DeclaredElementBase<D,E>, ParameterFacade<T>
Implements the facade view of an AnnotatedElement.
